project.name: dnb-harness
project.description: Ontology-grounded private-fund trust contract validation harness with deterministic guards, SHACL/cross-check validation, scoring, CLI experiment runner, and McNemar/bootstrap statistics.

layers.name: Docs and Status
layers.description: Project source-of-truth documentation, runbooks, and process files.

layers.name: Schemas and Ontology
layers.description: Pydantic schemas, ontology conversion, TTL vocabularies, and SHACL constraints.

layers.name: Extraction and Judging
layers.description: LLM backends, extraction prompts, normalization, and cross-check/Judge comparison logic.

layers.name: Ingest and Source Packages
layers.description: PDF text ingestion helpers and source package markers that support the extraction pipeline.

layers.name: Deterministic Guards
layers.description: G1/G2/G3 guard implementations and registry code that reject or null invalid extracted fields.

layers.name: Harness and CLI
layers.description: Pipeline orchestration, manifest/result models, CLI entry points, and operational scripts.

layers.name: Scoring and Statistics
layers.description: Golden-set scoring, comparison reports, metric breakdowns, and significance tests.

layers.name: Tests
layers.description: Pytest test suites covering interfaces, guards, harness behavior, scoring, CLI, and statistics.

layers.name: Runtime Artifacts
layers.description: Generated extraction, guard, SHACL, harness, and scoring artifacts kept for reproducibility.

tour.title: Project Status
tour.description: Start from the current status and bottlenecks before editing the harness.

tour.title: Interfaces
tour.description: Review the schemas and module boundaries that parallel work depends on.

tour.title: Extraction Path
tour.description: Follow LLM extraction through normalization and cross-document comparison.

tour.title: Ontology and Guards
tour.description: Inspect deterministic validation through RDF/SHACL and G1-G3 guard execution.

tour.title: Harness Runner
tour.description: Understand how baseline, ontology, and guard modes are orchestrated and recorded.

tour.title: Scoring and Evidence
tour.description: Finish with scoring, comparison reports, and statistical proof of guard impact.
